div.div:

Anthropic API (production 기본)
Ollama LAN (dev fallback)

div.div:
⚡ Vercel Functions (Fluid Compute)
• middleware.ts — 세션 갱신 / /dashboard 인가
• App Router + Server Actions
• /api/bookings — book_slot RPC (advisory lock)
• /api/.../block — run-token 검증 + Storage put
• /api/.../code-analysis — bundler → heuristics → LLM

div.div:
🗄️ Supabase (RLS-enforced, EU-North-1)
• Postgres — experiments / bookings / participants /
run_progress / outbox / payment_info
• Storage — experiment-data ({expId}/{subj}/block_N.json)
• Realtime — WSS channel (experiment_run_progress)
